title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China released JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with a split AI brain for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced two humanoid robots including the Dyno for security and service work, plus the VR-H3 for industrial applications. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor for researchers, advancing the humanoid robotics stack.
